alkylation reagent: alkylated by 15 mm iodoacetamide in the dark for 30 min at room temperature (RT)
cleavage agent: digested overnight by sequencing grade trypsin
enrichment method: the intact glycopeptides were enriched from TMT‐labeled peptide samples using mixed anion‐exchange columns (MAX, Waters)
instrument: Each sample underwent triplicate LC‐MS/MS runs on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Mass Spectrometer
labeling: TMT‐based glycoproteomic enables the quantification of glycopeptides
